skipLayer2.reason: needs real bottle photo: a malt-beverage label with ABV missing from the artwork. Current placeholder reuses 02-stones-throw-caps which prints '5.2% Alc./Vol.'.

governmentWarningText.value: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
governmentWarningText.evidenceQuote: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

(2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
